title: Chestnut and Mushroom Soba Noodle Stir Fry
description: A hearty and flavorful Japanese-inspired stir fry made with chestnut and mushroom, served on a bed of crunchy soba noodles. This dish is a perfect fusion of textures and flavors.
instructions: Cook soba noodles according to package instructions. Drain and set aside.
Heat Japanese sesame oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add sliced mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown.
Add sliced chestnuts and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
In a small bowl, whisk together soy sauce and 1 tablespoon of water. Pour the sauce over the chestnut and mushroom mixture.
Stir-fry for an additional 1-2 minutes until the sauce has thickened.
Add cooked soba noodles to the skillet and stir-fry for 1-2 minutes until well combined.
Transfer the noodle mixture to a serving platter.
Garnish with crunchy sesame seeds and chopped green onions.
